PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?opponentLabel ?date WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q2381114 ; wdt:P710 wd:Q6827329 ; wdt:P710 ?opponent ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(?opponent != wd:Q6827329)
  ?opponent rdfs:label ?opponentLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?opponentLabel) = 'en')
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
